files.patch:
@@ -104,8 +104,8 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     needs: [ci]
     if: github.event.action != 'closed' &&
-        (github.event_name == 'pull_request' || github.event_name == 'pull_request_target') &&
-        contains(github.event.pull_request.labels.*.name, 'ok-to-test')
+      (github.event_name == 'pull_request' || github.event_name == 'pull_request_target') &&
+      contains(github.event.pull_request.labels.*.name, 'ok-to-test')
     permissions:
       contents: read
       pull-requests: write
